insult指通过语言或行为进行人身攻击、侮辱，对象不能接受；shame指使某人感到羞愧、耻辱，对象能接受并愿改正。jewel

jewel ['dʒuːəl] n. 宝石；宝石饰物

派 jewel(l)ry(n. 珠宝)

 $ ^{*} $journalism ['dʒɜːnəlɪzəm] n. 新闻业；新闻工作

记 来自 journal(n. 日报，刊物，杂志)

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//067cfd96-3ecb-4cd7-a25a-0b1488629a2d/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_554_416_705_541.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F77078d9a3305947ef4c6aebab18cf52cdcd98b7ad211c25985777aefaf75e235" alt="Image" width="19%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//067cfd96-3ecb-4cd7-a25a-0b1488629a2d/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_554_416_705_541.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F77078d9a3305947ef4c6aebab18cf52cdcd98b7ad211c25985777aefaf75e235" alt="Image" width="19%" />

jewel
+

</div>


</div>


例 Modern journalism is not only limited to newspaper and magazine. 现代新闻业不仅仅局限于报纸和杂志。

kindness ['kaɪndnəs] n. 仁慈，好意

literary ['lɪtərəri] adj. 文学（上）的；文人的，书卷气的

记 词根记忆：liter(文字)+ary→文字上的→文学的

派 literacy(n. 读写能力)；literature(n. 文学；文献)

lobby [ˈlɒbi] n. 大厅；休息室；(对议员施加压力的)院外活动集团 v. 游说(从政者或政府)

派 lobbyist(n. 说客)

log [log] n. 原木，木料；航海（或飞行）日志 vt. 正式记录；伐木

考 log in 进入计算机系统 log out 退出计算机系统

真 When employees log in to their computers, they're shown a picture of one of their coworkers and asked to guess that person's name. 当员工登录自己的电脑时，电脑就会自动显示另外一名员工的照片，并要求登录者猜出那个人的名字。

*lunar [ˈluːnə(r)] adj. 月亮的，月球的

记 词根记忆：lun(月亮)+ar(…的)→月亮的

例 It's said that there would be a lunar eclipse tonight. 据说今天晚上可能会有月食出现。

☐ insult

☐ lobby



<table border=1 style='margin: auto; word-wrap: break-word;'><tr><td colspan="2">manual [ˈmænjuəl] adj. 用手的；手工做的 n. 手册，指南</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">记 词根记忆：manu(手) + al(…的) → 手工做的</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">考 manual labour 手工 a manual for students 学生手册</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">marvelous [ˈmɑːvələs] adj. 奇迹般的，了不起的\n记 发音记忆：“马虎了事” → 马虎做事不会有\n了不起的成就 → 了不起的</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">mild [maɪld] adj. 温柔的；温暖的；轻微的\n记 联想记忆：温柔 (mild) 的 m 颠倒过来写，就是野蛮的 (wild)\n例 Even the mild criticism will make Susan out of temper in public. 即使是轻微的批评，也会让苏珊在众人面前发脾气。</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">minister [ˈmɪnɪstər] n. 部长，大臣；公使，外交使节；牧师\n派 ministry[n. (政府的) 部门)]；ministerial(adj. 部长的)</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">minority [ˈmɑːnərəti] n. 少数；少数民族</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">motion [ˈməʊʃn] n. 运动；手势，眼色，动作；提议 v. (向…) 打手势，示意\n记 词根记忆：mot(移动) + ion → 运动；动作\n例 After I entered the office, the manager motioned me to a chair. 我进入办公室后，经理示意我坐下。</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">necessity [ˈnæsəti] n. 必需品；必要性，(迫切) 需要\n考 of necessity 无法避免地，必定\n例 That small computer will be installed on a Microsoft operating system. 那台小电脑必须要安装微软的操作系统。</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">neglect [ˈnɪɡlekt] n./vt. 忽视，忽略；疏忽\n记 词根记忆：neg(否定) + lect(选择) → 不去选它 → 忽视\n题 The earlier neglect of saving, however, makes it difficult not to work when you are older. 然而，年轻时不注意攒钱，当你年龄大的时候，想不工作都难。</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">neutral [ˈnɪtərəl] adj. 日常的；偶然的\n英 [ˈɜːrɪk] [ˈnɜːrəl] (美) [ˈnɜːrəl] adj. 中立的；中性的\n记 和 natural(adj. 自然的)一起记\n例 I didn&#x27;t take any group&#x27;s side; I tried to remain neutral. 我没有支持任何一组；我试图保持中立。</td></tr><tr><td colspan="2">� neutrality(n. 中立)；neutralize(vt. 中和；使中立)</td></tr></table>

☐ manual ☐ marvelous ☐ mild ☐ minister ☐ minority

☐ motion ☐ necessity ☐ neglect ☐ neutral

where ['nəʊweə(r)] adv. 任何地方都不

记 组合词：no(不)+where(在…地方)→任何地方都不

考 get nowhere 使无进展，使不能成功 nowhere near 肯定不，远远不，远不及

例 Those products are nowhere near good enough. 那些产品根本算不上是好产品。

obligation [ˌɒblɪˈɡeɪʃn] n. 义务，责任 记 来自 oblige(vt. 迫使)

outstanding [aut'stændɪŋ] adj. 突出的；杰出的；未解决的；未支付的

记 联想记忆：out+stand（站）+ing→站出来的→突出的

冀 Carême wanted to show to later generations that French chefs of his time were most outstanding in the world. 卡雷姆想告诉后人，师是世界上最杰出的厨师。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_546_328_706_449.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fd500b94b454c26ff2a60c8b29edc1c9d7136a8ff33d202ac38b3359a03acc830" alt="Image" width="20%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_546_328_706_449.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fd500b94b454c26ff2a60c8b29edc1c9d7136a8ff33d202ac38b3359a03acc830" alt="Image" width="20%" />

outstanding

</div>


</div>


overtake [ˌəʊvə(r)ˈteɪk] vt. 追上，超过；突然降临于；意外地碰上

记 组合词：over(越过)+take(获取)→追上，超过

例 We will overtake them in another minute. 我们再过一分钟就可以追上他们。

oxygen [ˈɒksɪdʒən] n. 氧，氧气

记 词根记忆：oxy(氧的)+gen(产生)→氧气

palm [paːm] n. 手掌；掌状物；棕榈树 vt. 把…藏于手掌中

记 联想记忆：她握紧手心 (palm)，心里很不平静 (calm)

考 palm off 用…进行欺骗，用欺骗手段把…卖掉

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_549_692_699_813.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Faabad399ec0c2be0b14ee6ee75ad743536eaabb502f3dbf9bdd23fff5456c254" alt="Image" width="19%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_549_692_699_813.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Faabad399ec0c2be0b14ee6ee75ad743536eaabb502f3dbf9bdd23fff5456c254" alt="Image" width="19%" />

palm

</div>


</div>


permit [pəˈmɪt] vt. 允许；(使)有可能 [ˈpɜːmɪt] n. 执照，许可证

真 The author permits her children to use the screen for at most half an hour a day. 作者允许自己的孩子每天最多使用屏幕设备（指电子设备）半个小时。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_575_827_707_949.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fae0ee6a4c16b035301bc919a50745f8a3a768e953a5e4811f2f86056b38b786a" alt="Image" width="17%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_575_827_707_949.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fae0ee6a4c16b035301bc919a50745f8a3a768e953a5e4811f2f86056b38b786a" alt="Image" width="17%" />

简老猪想请三天假
permit

</div>


</div>


*plague [pleig] n. 瘟疫；鼠疫；灾患 vt. 使痛苦（或难受）

考 plague sb. with sth. 用某事物来烦扰或折磨某人

Drugs and gang violence were just beginning to plague the projects. 毒品和帮派暴力刚刚开始扰乱这片住宅区。

#### porter

['pɔːtə(r)] n. 搬运工人；门卫，大楼管理员

记 词根记忆：port(拿，运)+er(表人)→搬运工人

#### pregnant

['pregnənt] adj. 怀孕的，妊娠的

记 词根记忆：pregn( 拿住 )+ant → 拿住，怀有→怀孕的

真 Pregnant employees struggled to keep up. 怀孕的员工拼命努力跟上别人。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_565_207_714_350.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F0f224d6c8e5a6aa5730931d9076bef0d48c4fc54f58b15e13dc83d0c6781b9a9" alt="Image" width="19%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_565_207_714_350.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F0f224d6c8e5a6aa5730931d9076bef0d48c4fc54f58b15e13dc83d0c6781b9a9" alt="Image" width="19%" />

pregnant
女八国

</div>


</div>


派 pregnancy(n. 怀孕)

#### prescribe

[pri'skraib] vt. 开（药）；吩咐采用（某种疗法）；规定，指定

词根记忆：pre(预先)+scribe(写)→预先写好的→开(药)；规定

One food-as-medicine program not only prescribes food for treatment but teaches patients how to cook it. 一个“食疗”的项目不仅为治疗病人开食物处方，而且还教病人如何烹饪食物。

派 prescription(n. 处方)

##### presence

['prezns] n. 出席，到场；存在；仪表，仪态

来自 present(n. 现在 adj. 出席的); 参考: absence (n. 不在, 缺席)

考 in one's presence 当着某人的面，有某人在场 presence of mind 镇定自若

The colored people felt uneasy at the presence of the whites in their neighborhoods. 当白人出现在有色人种的居住区时，有色人种会觉得不自在。

### Word List 16

影视剧场景

配套音频及

#### prosperity

[pro'sperəti] n. 繁荣，兴旺

记 词根记忆：pro(在前)+sper(希望)+ity → 前面充满希望 → 繁荣，兴旺

例 In prosperity think of adversity. 居安思危。

#### protest

[prə'test] v. 抗议，反对；申辩，申明 ['prəutest] n. 抗议，反对

记 联想记忆：pro(在前) + test(测验) → 提前测试，遭到学生反对、抗议 → 抗议，反对

例 More and more workers learned to protest against the poor working conditions by law 越来越多的工人学会了依靠法律来抗议恶劣的工作环境。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_3/imgs/img_in_image_box_546_366_708_507.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F6e6197ed88de686a3e4ceee149de9e6a852f314b4e7c50bde7e9ff5d36d3a7e9" alt="Image" width="21%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2e328451-b167-4ad4-add4-615f2c9b1a63/markdown_3/imgs/img_in_image_box_546_366_708_507.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F6e6197ed88de686a3e4ceee149de9e6a852f314b4e7c50bde7e9ff5d36d3a7e9" alt="Image" width="21%" />

PROTEST OF LAXATION
protest

</div>


</div>


radiation [ˌreɪdiˈeɪʃn] n. 放射物；辐射能；辐射

记 词根记忆：radi(光线)+ation(表状态)→光线呈放射状→辐射

例 There was a radiation leak because of an accident at the power station. 核电站的一起事故导致了辐射泄漏。

rail [reɪl] n. 栏杆；横杆；铁轨，轨道；铁路 vi. 责骂，抱怨

记参考：railway(n. 铁路)

考 rail at/against 咒骂，严厉责备，抱怨

真 Thousands of rail passengers in China were prevented from leaving after adverse weather delayed trains. 在中国，恶劣天气造成火车延误，导致数千名旅客滞留。

reasonable ['ri:znəbl] adj. 通情达理的，讲道理的；合理的；（价钱）公道的；尚好的，过得去的

真 “Children have to learn to negotiate the world on their own, within reasonable boundaries,” White says. 怀特说：“在合理的范围内，孩子们必须学会自己来应对这个世界。”

refine [rɪˈfaɪn] vt. 精炼，精制，提纯；使改进，使完善

记 词根记忆：re(一再)+fine(纯的；精美的)→精炼，提纯

真 Groups like these will help you refine your analytical skills and enable you to express yourself better. 这样的小组将有助于你完善分



<table border=1 style='margin: auto; word-wrap: break-word;'><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>refrigerator</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ri&#x27;fridʒəreɪtə(r)] n. 冰箱；冷藏库\n记 词根记忆：re(表加强) + friger(冷) + a + tor(表物) → 用来一直冷冻物品的东西 → 冰箱\n派 refrigeration(n. 冷藏)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>reluctant</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ri&#x27;ʌktənt] adj. 不情愿的，勉强的\n记 发音记忆：“驴拉坦克” → 真够勉强的 → 勉强的\n例 They were reluctant to sacrifice their own economic interests. 他们不愿意牺牲自己的经济利益。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>reproduce</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>派 reluctance(n. 勉强)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>revise</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ri&#x27;vɑrɪz] v. 修订，修改；复习\n记 词根记忆：re + vis(看) + e → 反复看 → 修订；复习\n例 I&#x27;ve got to revise my plan because of the delay. 由于延期，我必须修改我的计划。\n派 revision(n. 修订)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>rhythm</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;rɪðəm] n. 韵律，节奏\n记 联想记忆：音乐好听的原因 (reason) 是有节奏 (rhythm)\n派 rhythmic(al)(adj. 节奏分明的)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>rod</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[rod] n. 杆，棒\n记 联想记忆：拿着木棒 (rod) 打劫 (rob)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>scandal</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;skændl] n. 丑事，丑闻；流言蜚语；（由丑闻引起的）反感，愤慨\n记 联想记忆：scan(扫描) + dal → 扫描时事，揭露丑闻 → 丑事，丑闻派 scandalous(adj. 可耻的)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>secondary</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;sekəndəri] adj. 次要的，第二的；（教育、学校等）中等的；辅助的；从属的\n记 来自 second(num. 第二)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>refrigerator</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ˈrefrɪɡərɪz] n. 容器；容器；容器；容器；容器</td></tr></table>

毕业后，学生应为了享受获得知识的乐趣而对某一学科产生足够的兴趣。

sensible ['sensəbl] adj. 明智的；合情理的；有知觉的 词根记忆: sens(感觉)+ible(可…的)→可感觉到的→有知觉的 例 I think taking a taxi home is the most sensible choice for us. 我想对我们来说最明智的选择就是坐出租车回家。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_0/imgs/img_in_image_box_493_182_708_304.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F3b8019810f9bdcd955da54b1561514caf7e7e982f4134582e4be8825694bf69b" alt="Image" width="28%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_0/imgs/img_in_image_box_493_182_708_304.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F3b8019810f9bdcd955da54b1561514caf7e7e982f4134582e4be8825694bf69b" alt="Image" width="28%" />

预报有雨
sensible

</div>


</div>


#####  $ ^{*} $setback

['setbæk] n. 挫折，倒退；阻碍

记 组合词：set(放置，设置)+back(向后)→放到后面→倒退；阻碍

signature [ˈsɪɡnətʃə(r)] n. 署名，签字，签名

记 词根记忆： $ \text{sign} $(记号)+ature(表行为、状态)→在文件上做记号→签名

真 The package is too big and it needs a signature to confirm you have received it. 包裹太大了，需要您签字确认您已收到包裹。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_0/imgs/img_in_image_box_576_378_711_500.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F4052e359ff358a1ba5c9a28ee236cfda5db529cfb1102d09e79d5e503358c762" alt="Image" width="17%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_0/imgs/img_in_image_box_576_378_711_500.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2F4052e359ff358a1ba5c9a28ee236cfda5db529cfb1102d09e79d5e503358c762" alt="Image" width="17%" />

signature
齐天大圣

</div>


</div>


*skip [skip] n. 跳，蹦跳 vt. 跳过，略过，漏过；不做（本来常做或应做的事）vi. 跳；跳绳

例 The experts could skip the basic part of training. 专家们可以不用参加基础环节的培训。

slope [sləʊp] n. 倾斜；斜面 vi. 倾斜

记联想记忆：slo(看作 slow，慢的) + pe → 慢慢地走 下斜坡 → 倾斜；斜面

Large mammals once wandered the volcano's slopes, but today, foxes, wild cats, rabbits and mice are more common. 过去，大型哺乳动物曾在火山斜坡上漫游、徘徊，但如今狐狸、野猫、兔子和老鼠更为常见。

somehow [ˈsʌmhaʊ] adv. 由于某种原因，不知怎么地；以某种方式

## somehow stack

[stæk] n. 堆，垛 vt. 堆积；摞起

记 联想记忆：库存 (stock) 一堆 (stack) 商品

例 Dishes are stacked up in a drying rack. 盘子被叠放在一个烘干架上。

##### stir

[st3:(r)] v. 搅动；拨动；激动；唤起 n. 搅拌，搅动；激动；骚乱

考 stir up 激起，挑起

例 She sat there quietly stirring her black coffee with a plastic spoon.

她安静地坐在那儿，用一个塑料勺子搅拌着她的黑咖啡。

stove [stəuv] n. 炉，火炉



<table border=1 style='margin: auto; word-wrap: break-word;'><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>string</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[string] n. 线，细绳；一串，一行 vt. (string, strung, strung)(用线、绳)缚，扎，挂；(用线)串起，穿；使排成一列；伸展，拉直 vi. 连成一串；排成一行</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>记 联想记忆：st+ring(铃)→一串铃铛→一串</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>考 string out(使)成行地展开 string along 跟随；陪伴</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>sympathy</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;simpə \theta i] n. 同情；志同道合，(思想感情上的)支持，赞同</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>记 词根记忆：sym(相同)+path(感情)+y→怀有相同的感情→同情</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>真 When the essayists were later praised for their sympathy, they felt even worse about what they had written. 当这些散文家后来因同情他人而受到称赞时，他们对自己所写的文章感觉甚至更糟。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>派 sympathize(vi. 同情；理解；支持)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>*tablet</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;tæblət] n. 药片；(固定于墙上作纪念的)碑，牌</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>temptation</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[temp&#x27;teɪʃn] n. 诱惑，引诱；煽诱人的事物</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>记 来自 tempt(vt. 诱惑)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>例 I couldn&#x27;t resist the temptation to open the love letter immediately. 我无法抵挡住诱惑，立刻打开了情书。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>terminal</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;tɜːmɪnl] adj. (疾病)晚期的，不治的；末端的，终点的，极限的 n. (海、陆、空运输路线的)终点(站)；(计算机)终端；接线端</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>记 词根记忆：termin(界限)+al(…的)→末端的，极限的</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>例 He smoked all his life and finally was diagnosed with terminal lung cancer. 他抽了一辈子的烟，最终被诊断为肺癌晚期。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>territory</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>〈英〉[&#x27;teratrɪ]〈美〉[&#x27;terətɒrɪ] n. 领土，版图；领域</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>记 词根记忆：terr(土)+it+ory(表物)→领土</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>真 That&#x27;s OK between sisters but becomes dangerous territory when you&#x27;re talking to the children of friends or acquaintances. 这在姐妹间还好，但是当你同朋友或熟人的孩子这么说时，就危险了。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>派 territorial(adj. 领土的)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>tidy</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;taɪdi] adj. 整洁的，整齐的 v. (使)整洁，(使)整齐</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>考 tidy away 收拾起来</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>transmit</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;trænz&#x27;mɪt] vt. 传送，传递；传染；播送；发射</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>记 词根记忆：trans(穿过)+mit(送)→送过去→传送</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>派 transmitter(n. 传播者)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>troublesome</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;trʌblsəm] adj. 令人烦恼的，麻烦的</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'></td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>例 Compared with girls, boys are those who tend to cause troublesome problems. 与女孩相比，男孩才更容易制造麻烦的问题。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>stove</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>string</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>terminal</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>territory</td></tr></table>

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_569_100_711_236.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2Fae0a49cd54508cb134ee254af5a3a4e90760c3c4a911de2313d5b428eb0b1389" alt="Image" width="18%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_569_100_711_236.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A49Z%2F-1%2F%2Fae0a49cd54508cb134ee254af5a3a4e90760c3c4a911de2313d5b428eb0b1389" alt="Image" width="18%" />

放我出去
炼丹炉
stove

</div>


</div>


undergo [ʌndəˈɡəʊ] vt. 经历，经受，忍受；接受（治疗、检查等）

记 组合词：under(在…下)+go(走)→从下面走过→经历

真 Every form of life undergoes evolution. 一切生命形式都要经历进化。

*undermine [ˌʌndəˈmaɪn] vt. 逐渐削弱（信心、权威等）；从根基处破坏；在…下面挖通道

记 组合词：under(在下面) + mine(开采) → 在…下面挖通道

例 Difficulties undermined the children's confidence. 重重困难逐渐削弱了孩子们的自信心。

##### vanish

['vænɪʃ] v. 突然不见，消失；不复存在，绝迹

记 词根记忆：van(空) + ish → 空无一物 → 消失；不复存在

真 By the end of the 19th century, as the frontier vanished, the US had a mild panic attack. 到 19 世纪末期，随着边境消失，美国经受了一阵轻微的恐慌。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_605_371_709_467.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A50Z%2F-1%2F%2Febe49311f43ac9108d03987705f6cc1f159afdfda76cc23046441205356b9dfa" alt="Image" width="13%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_605_371_709_467.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A50Z%2F-1%2F%2Febe49311f43ac9108d03987705f6cc1f159afdfda76cc23046441205356b9dfa" alt="Image" width="13%" />

俺去也

</div>


</div>


##### violate

['varələlt] vt. 违反，违背；亵渎；侵犯；妨碍

记 发音记忆: “why late” → 违反制度，迟到了 → 违反，违背

真 What happens if we lie, cheat, steal, or violate other ethical standards? 如果我们说谎、欺骗、盗窃，或违反其他道德标准，会发生什么呢?

派 violation(n. 违反)

violin [varə'lin] n. 小提琴

派 violinist(n. 小提琴手)

##### visual

['vɪʒuəl] adj. 视觉的 n. 视觉资料（说明性的图片、影片）

记 词根记忆：vis(看)+ual(…的)→视觉的

真 Instead, I have given them this: the visual of their physics professor heavily pregnant doing physics experiments. 相反，我给他们放了一段影片：他们身怀六甲的物理学教授正在做物理实验。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_569_736_707_838.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A50Z%2F-1%2F%2F84a2ebc3c29d47aa577c0d3f8c3cdf1a19b742c3bdf801a37e019c5c5854b608" alt="Image" width="18%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_569_736_707_838.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A50Z%2F-1%2F%2F84a2ebc3c29d47aa577c0d3f8c3cdf1a19b742c3bdf801a37e019c5c5854b608" alt="Image" width="18%" />

visual

</div>


</div>


派 visualize(vt. 使形象化)

vitamin [ˈvɪtəmɪn] n. 维生素；维他命 记 发音记忆：“维他命”

美籍波兰生物化学家芬克创造的此词。他用拉丁语词 vita（生命）加amine（胺）构成 vitamine，后去掉 e，变为 vitamin。

volume （英）['vɒljuːm]（美）['vaːljəm; 'vaːljuːm] n. 卷，册，书卷；容积，体积；音量，响度

记 联想记忆：volu(看作 volut，卷)+me → 卷

派 voluminous(adj. 肥大的)

weekly ['wiːkli] adj. 每周的 adv. 每周

worthy ['wɜːrði] adj. 有价值的；值得的

考 be worthy of 值得… be worthy to do 值得做…

例 He wasn't worthy of breathing the same air with her. 他不配与她相提并论。

派 worthiness(n. 值得；有价值)

wreck [rek] n. 失事；残骸；精神或身体已垮的人 vt. 破坏派 wreckage(n. 残骸)

zone [zəun] n. 地区，区域；范围

记 联想记忆：z(看作 zoo，动物园)+one → 一个动物园的范围 → 范围

例 Special attention has been paid to the special economic zones along the sea. 人们特别关注了沿海经济特区。

absolute ['æbsəluːt] adj. 十足的，确实的；绝对的，完全的；不受任何限制的

真 But what was perhaps most astonishing about Mr. Jobs was the absolute loyalty he managed to inspire in customers. 但是乔布斯先生最令人惊奇之处或许是，他设法激发了顾客的绝对忠诚。

accompany [əˈkʌmpəni] vt. 陪伴，陪同；伴随；为…伴奏（或伴唱）

记 词根记忆：ac(表加强)+company(陪伴)→陪伴；伴随

例 The text is accompanied by a series of wonderful photographs. 这篇文章附有一系列精美的照片。

ache [eɪk] vi. 疼痛；渴望 n. 疼痛

辨 ache, pain

ache 常指程度较轻、局部持续不断的疼痛，且常和身体名称相连；pain 为普遍用词，可指任何类型和程度的疼痛。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_3/imgs/img_in_image_box_578_769_714_872.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A50Z%2F-1%2F%2F0ea4bb91bd728c467e6c269f956d46595a0da521b40abed70f3b09bf12b444d4" alt="Image" width="17%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_3/imgs/img_in_image_box_578_769_714_872.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A50Z%2F-1%2F%2F0ea4bb91bd728c467e6c269f956d46595a0da521b40abed70f3b09bf12b444d4" alt="Image" width="17%" />

ache

</div>


</div>


acid [ˈæsɪd] n. 酸 adj. 酸味的；酸性的

记 本身为词根：酸的

派 acidity(n. 酸性)

acre ['eɪkə(r)] n. 英亩

*administer [ədˈmɪnɪstə(r)] vt. 掌管，料理…的事务；施行，实施；给予，派给；施用（药物）

volume ☐ weekly ☐ worthy ☐ wreck ☐ zone

absolute ☐ accompany ☐ ache ☐ acid ☐ acre

记 词根记忆：ad(做)+minister(部长)→做部长→掌管

例 It is not the job of the police to administer justice; that falls to the courts. 执行司法不是警察的工作；那是法院的职责。

alongside [əˌlɒŋˈsaɪd] adv. 在旁边，沿着边；并排地 prep. 在…旁边，沿着…的边；与…一起

记 组合词：along(沿着)+side(边)→沿着边

##### anticipate

een'trispeit] vt. 预料，预期，期望；先于•行动；预先准备

词根记忆：anti(先)+cip(拿)+ate(做)→先拿到→先于…行动

anticipation(n. 预料，期望)；anticipated(adj. 受期待的，让人期盼的)

##### astonish

[əˈstɒnɪʃ] vt. 使惊讶，使吃惊

[əˈstɒnɪʃ] vt. 使惊讶，使吃惊

记 联想记忆：a(一个)+ston(看作 stone，石头)+ish(使…)→一石激起千层浪，怎不叫人惊讶→使惊讶

例 Many of these tricks astonished many adults. 许多这样的小把戏让很多成年人感到惊讶。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_184_474_201_505.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2Fb8b61b60ab8a6ddf7b648df4fd287953e1779b1b5aca236ecc56ecc5a2e4db40" alt="Image" width="2%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_184_474_201_505.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2Fb8b61b60ab8a6ddf7b648df4fd287953e1779b1b5aca236ecc56ecc5a2e4db40" alt="Image" width="2%" />

词源

</div>


</div>


源于拉丁语词 extonare，字面意思是“雷击”，因此 astonish 最初常作“使震惊”“使惊呆”等意，后弱化为“使吃惊”“使惊讶”。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_187_527_206_546.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2Fcdf598dbf1bc39a3a8df794d070cbd5be0b4c23054b73072524414d5f12956de" alt="Image" width="2%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_187_527_206_546.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2Fcdf598dbf1bc39a3a8df794d070cbd5be0b4c23054b73072524414d5f12956de" alt="Image" width="2%" />

派

</div>


</div>


派 astonishment(n. 惊讶)

##### attorney

我的委托人

无罪！

[əˈtɜːni] n. 律师；（业务或法律事务上的）代理人

记 词根记忆：at(表加强)+torn(转)+ey→玩转法律的人 →律师

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_596_546_696_627.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2F48317ee38d7db196e4df2752d564aee23be4778bab3f39cc882805ad6645a641" alt="Image" width="13%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_596_546_696_627.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2F48317ee38d7db196e4df2752d564aee23be4778bab3f39cc882805ad6645a641" alt="Image" width="13%" />

元非1
被告

</div>


</div>


attorney

##### bake

[beik] vt. 烤，烘，焙

联想记忆：bake ham（烤火腿）音似“贝克汉姆”（英国著名足球运动员）

例 I'll ask a cook to bake you a little cake. 我会请厨师给你烤一个小蛋糕。

派 bakery(n. 面包店)

##### bankrupt

['bæŋkrʌpt] adj. 破产的

记 词根记忆：bank(银行)+rupt(打破)→银行里的账户

被“打破”→破产的

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_594_699_709_831.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2F8942be803521222529f3fcbb4edbf3d373b7679735bea40080e1158ff9db5f76" alt="Image" width="15%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_594_699_709_831.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2F8942be803521222529f3fcbb4edbf3d373b7679735bea40080e1158ff9db5f76" alt="Image" width="15%" />

股市
bankrupt

</div>

##### 词源

源自意大利文 banca rotta，字面意思是“破凳子”。古代的兑钱者都是在市场、庙宇等公众场合摆个桌子或长条凳子，替人换钱。他们同时也放高利贷，如果借高利贷的人还不上钱或者死亡，兑钱者也无法偿还所借资本给他的后台老板，后台老板就到市场里把兑钱台砸掉。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_186_969_203_987.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2Fc2eb203258260409c31de0be21d60e620731fc4169a499da6cf22a35988c4cc7" alt="Image" width="2%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//75cef577-1511-4dec-881d-28348393a064/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_186_969_203_987.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A51Z%2F-1%2F%2Fc2eb203258260409c31de0be21d60e620731fc4169a499da6cf22a35988c4cc7" alt="Image" width="2%" />

派

</div>


</div>


派bankruptcy(n. 破产)

[beə(r)] adj. 赤裸的；光秃的，无遮盖的；刚刚够的，勉强的 vt. 露出；脱掉（衣服）

记和bear(n.熊)一起记

辨 bare, blank, hollow, vacant

bare指身体某一部分赤裸着；blank指留有空白；

hollow指物体中空的；vacant指某物未被占用或职位空缺

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2fd63396-921c-477a-ac83-f5f418d2a812/markdown_0/imgs/img_in_image_box_589_106_718_196.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A45Z%2F-1%2F%2F28dcfe333e58d8dde09e621064fc458489df2c14a1f9eede2e78f122c967ba8d" alt="Image" width="16%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2fd63396-921c-477a-ac83-f5f418d2a812/markdown_0/imgs/img_in_image_box_589_106_718_196.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A45Z%2F-1%2F%2F28dcfe333e58d8dde09e621064fc458489df2c14a1f9eede2e78f122c967ba8d" alt="Image" width="16%" />

穿上bear

</div>


</div>


bare

##### beloved

 $ \underline{例} $ Frank never recovered from the pain caused by the death of his beloved little daughter. 弗兰克心爱的小女儿去世了，他一直没能从悲痛中恢复过来。

#### bet

[bet] vt. (bet, bet, bet) 打赌；敢说，确信 n. 打赌；赌金，赌注

例 If you lose this bet, you'll owe me a thousand dollars. 如果你打赌输了，你将欠我 1000 美元。

##### brake

[brekk] n. 闸，刹车 v. 制动；刹住（车），用闸使（车）放慢速度

例 She braked sharply to avoid another car. 她为了躲另一辆车而紧急刹车。

brave [breɪv] adj. 勇敢的

[breiv] adj. 勇敢的

记 联想记忆：坟墓 (grave) 里躺着勇敢的 (brave) 阵亡士兵

真 Fortune favors the brave. 幸运往往眷顾那些勇敢的人。

派 bravery(n. 英勇)

##### bump

[bʌmp] v. 碰，撞；颠簸着前进 n. 碰撞，猛撞；（碰撞造成的）肿块；隆起，凸块

象声词：物体碰撞的声音

考 bump against/into 碰上，撞上 speed bump 减速带

真 I bumped into someone I know on the platform every day. 我每天都会在站台上碰到某个我认识的人。

##### cable

['keɪbl] n. 缆，索；电缆；有线电视；电报

联想记忆：他在工作台 (table) 上夜以继日地研究电缆 (cable)

☑ When one mother realized that cable TV was costing her five hundred dollars a year, she decided that network TV wasn't so bad. 当一位母亲意识到有线电视每年花费她500美元时，她断定网络电视也不是那么糟糕。

##### carrier

['kæriə(r)] n. 运输工具，运载工具；病毒携带者；载重架，置物架

记来自 carry(v. 运送)

例 Edward was taken away as a carrier of COVID-19. 爱德华作为新型冠状病毒携带者被带走了。

champion [ˈtʃæmpɪən] n. 冠军，优胜者；捍卫者，拥护者 v. 捍卫，维护

记发音记忆：“产品”→冠军是付出无数汗水后得来的“产品”→冠军

例 He is the boxing champion of the world. 他是世界拳击冠军。

派 championship(n. 锦标赛)

choke [tʃəʊk] v. (使)窒息；塞满，塞住；(使)哽咽

记 联想记忆：喝可口可乐 (Coca Cola)，呛着 (choke) 了

考 choke up 哽咽

真 The physical act of crying is mainly one of breathing in air, which is why we choke up when we weep. 哭泣时身体上的主要动作是吸气，这就是为什么我们在哭泣时会哽咽。

civilize/-ise ['sɪvəlaɪz] vt. 使文明，使开化

真 Without the wild world we are not more but less civilized. 没有了自然界，我们的文明程度不会更高，而会更低。

派 civilization(n. 文明，文化；开化)

*clarity* ['klærəti] n. 清楚，明晰

记 词根记忆：clar(清楚) + ity → 清楚

例 The main problem of your report is its lack of clarity of thought. 你的报告的最大问题是思路不够清晰。

派 clarify(v. 阐明)；clarification(n. 说明)

conscious [ˈkɒnʃəs] adj. 意识到的；神志清醒的；有意的，存心的

记 词根记忆：con+sci(知道)+ous → 知道的 → 神志清醒的

考 be conscious of 意识到；注意到 become conscious 恢复知觉

派 consciousness(n. 知觉；意识)；unconscious(adj. 失去知觉的；无意识的)

consensus [kənˈsensəs] n. (意见等)一致，一致同意

词根记忆：con(共同)+sens(感觉)+us→有同感→一致同意

consensus on 对…的共识

真 There's still no consensus on how much time online constitutes too much or whether addiction is possible. 目前，对于上网多长时间属于过度上网和上网是否有可能成瘾这两个问题，人们还没有达成共识。

[kɒnsɪkwəntli] adv. 因此，因而，所以

记来自consequent(adj. 随之发生的)

辨consequently, continuously, constantly, consistently

consequently 意为“因此”；continuously 意为“不断地，连续地”，

指没有间歇地、连续进行地；constantly 意为 “始终；重复不断地”，指某种行为没有改变；consistently 意为 “一贯，一向”，指言行、思想前后一致。

controversy [ˈkɒntrəvɜːsɪ] n. 争论，辩论

记 词根记忆：contro(相反)+vers(转)+y→意见转向相反的方向→争论

counsel ['kaunsl] n. 律师，法律顾问；忠告，劝告 vt. 劝告；提议 派 counsel(l)or(n. 顾问)

cupboard [ˈkʌbəd] n. 橱柜；碗碟橱，食物橱

记 组合词：cup(杯子)+board(木板)→放杯子的木板→橱柜

curse [kɜːs] v. 诅咒，咒骂 n. 天谴；祸害，祸根

例 The family had been cursed by a witch for nearly a century. 将近一个世纪以来，这个家庭都受到一名女巫的诅咒。

dairy ['deəri] n. 牛奶场；乳制品 adj. 乳制品的

记 联想记忆：每天 (daily) 吃乳制品 (dairy)，强壮骨骼

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2fd63396-921c-477a-ac83-f5f418d2a812/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_565_363_700_497.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A46Z%2F-1%2F%2F534e15c39380ec2439b6e41e878a2e4b2e743c8eddee07fb284dc769c8542853" alt="Image" width="17%" />

泼猴！粥马温！
curse

</div>


</div>


daylight ['deɪlaɪt] n. 白昼，日光，黎明

记 组合词：day(白天)+light(光)→白昼

definite [ˈdefɪnət] adj. 明确的，肯定的

记 词根记忆：de+fin(范围)+ite → 划定范围的 → 明确的

派 definitely(adv. 一定，明确地)

delicious [dr'lɪʃəs] adj. 美味的；芬芳宜人的

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2fd63396-921c-477a-ac83-f5f418d2a812/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_545_648_701_798.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A46Z%2F-1%2F%2F6b5e562043337e41b769e44c51d2ed356fffc9cf13c624770352243cce023412" alt="Image" width="20%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2fd63396-921c-477a-ac83-f5f418d2a812/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_545_648_701_798.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A46Z%2F-1%2F%2F6b5e562043337e41b769e44c51d2ed356fffc9cf13c624770352243cce023412" alt="Image" width="20%" />

delicious
吃完得累死啊

</div>


</div>


Verifone, the company that makes the store's card reader would not confirm or deny that the plastic bag trick worked. 惠尔丰公司生产这家商店所用的读卡器，它不承认塑料袋这个把戏能够起作用，同时也不否认。

派 denial(n. 否定)

deposit [dr'pɒzɪt] vt. 使沉淀；存放；存储；把（某物）放在（某地）n. 订金；押金；存款；沉积层

记 词根记忆：de+posit(放)→把财物妥善保管→将钱存入银行→存款

<div style="text-align: center;"><div style="text-align: center;">I just got a text message from my bank, saying my salary has been deposited in my account. 我刚收到一条银行的短信，显示我的工资已经到账了。</div> </div>


And gladly would learn, and gladly teach.

勤于学习的人才能乐于施教。

——英国诗人乔叟（Chaucer, British poet）

配套视频课

影视剧场景

配套音频及

#### deprive

[dr'praiv] vt. 剥夺，使丧失

记 词根记忆：de(去掉)+priv(个人)+e→拿走个人物品→剥夺，使丧失

考 deprive...of 使…丧失

Online systems may deprive teachers of opportunities to make the best use of their expertise for their students. 在线系统可能会剥夺教师为学生充分利用专业知识的机会。

deputy [ˈdepjʊti] n. 副职，副手；代表，代理人

联想记忆：de+puty(看作 duty，责任) → 代理人应负责 → 代理人

determination [dɪˌtɜːmɪˈneɪʃn] n. 决心，决定；确定

I must say I admire your determination. 我必须说我佩服你的决心。

##### dictate

[drk'tert] v. 口授；命令，规定，要求 [drkteit] n. 命令，指挥

记 词根记忆：dict(说话)+ate(做) → 口授

派 dictation(n. 口授；听写)；dictator(n. 独裁者)

*dilemma [dɪˈlemə] n.（进退两难的）窘境，困境

记发音记忆：“地雷嘛”→被陷雷区，进退两难→困境

例 The boss was in a dilemma.老板进退维谷。

dip [dɪp] n./v. 浸，蘸

记 发音记忆：发音像 “deep” → 在深水里浸一浸→浸，蘸

考 dip into 浏览；探讨（问题），研究

####  $ ^{*} $disable

dive [daɪv] vi./n. 跳水；潜水；（飞机或鸟）俯冲

记 联想记忆：我第一次跳水 (dive)，给 (give) 我点儿勇气

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2fd63396-921c-477a-ac83-f5f418d2a812/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_564_892_705_1036.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A47Z%2F-1%2F%2F63b5264c260d52e8c3b81a1c8aa3d8f6ea12cbada8018d545ac6063ead025164" alt="Image" width="18%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//2fd63396-921c-477a-ac83-f5f418d2a812/markdown_4/imgs/img_in_image_box_564_892_705_1036.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A47Z%2F-1%2F%2F63b5264c260d52e8c3b81a1c8aa3d8f6ea12cbada8018d545ac6063ead025164" alt="Image" width="18%" />

dive
三沙河

</div>


</div>


☐ deprive ☐ deputy ☐ determination ☐ dictate

☐ dip ☐ disable ☐ dive



<table border=1 style='margin: auto; word-wrap: break-word;'><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>doubtful</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;daʊtfl] adj. 不大可能的；怀疑的\n记 来自 doubt(v. 怀疑)\n考 阅读理解中考查作者态度的题常用的词：doubtful 怀疑的；sympathetic 赞成的；critical 批评的；objective 客观的</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>dynamic</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[daɪˈnæmɪk] adj. 有活力的；动力的；不断变化的 n. 动态；(原)动力；[pl.] 动力学\n记 词根记忆：dynam(力量) + ic → 有活力的</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>earthquake</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;ɜː \theta kweɪk] n. 地震\n记 组合词：earth(地球) + quake(震动) → 地震</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>elaborate</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ɪˈlæbərət] adj. 复杂的；详尽的；精心制作的\n[ɪˈlæbəreɪt] v. 详述；详细制订\n记 联想记忆：e(出) + labor(劳动) + ate(使) → 通过辛苦劳动做出来 → 精心制作的</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>embarrass</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ɪmˈbærəs] vt. 使窘迫；使为难\n记 His questions about my private life embarrassed me. 他询问我的私生活使我感到很尴尬。\n记 embarrassment(n. 难堪)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>embrace</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ɪmˈbreɪs] n. 拥抱，怀抱 vt. 拥抱；欣然接受；包括\n记 词根记忆：em(在…内) + brace(胳膊) → 用胳膊揽入怀抱 → 拥抱\n记 She held out her arms to embrace the little girl. 她伸出双臂来拥抱那个小女孩。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>emperor</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;empərə(r)] n. 皇帝\n记 参考：empress(n. 皇后)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>empire</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;empɪə(r)] n. 帝国</td></tr></table>

#####  $ ^{*} $entrepreneur

[ontraprə'n3:(r)] n. 企业家

记 来自 enterprise(n. 企业；事业心)

例 Research reveals that the youngest child of the family in Scotland is more likely to be an entrepreneur. 研究显示，在苏格兰，家庭中最小的孩子更有可能会成为企业家。

派 entrepreneurial(adj. 企业家的；具有企业素质的)

##### envy

['envi] n. 妒忌；羡慕；妒忌的对象 vt. 妒忌；羡慕

记发音记忆：“安慰”→因为妒忌，安慰都显得假惺惺→妒忌

真 Being an information technology, or IT, worker is not a job I envy. 做一名信息技术工作者，并不是我羡慕的工作。

派 envious(adj. 羡慕的；忌妒的)

#####  $ ^{*} $ethic

['eθɪk] n. 道德准则；行为准则；伦理标准；道德体系

例 You should be looking for an employee whose work ethic and motivations match your company's core value. 你应该寻找这样一名员工：他的职业道德和工作动机与贵公司的核心价值观相匹配。派 ethics(n. 伦理学)

##### excess

[Ik'ses] n. 超越；过量，过度[ekses] adj. 过量的；额外的

记 词根记忆：ex(出)+cess(行走)→走出界限→过量，过度

考 in excess of 超过 to excess 过度，过分，过量

例 Don't be an excess of enthusiasm. 别过分热心了。

辨 in excess of, in relation to, in contrast to, in favor of

in excess of 意为“超过”；in relation contrast to 意为“和…形成对比”；in fa

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_481_534_707_664.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A47Z%2F-1%2F%2Fd398852a8692cd71e2f856e77f926318236a93fd64d4dc7c62267c4bed401749" alt="Image" width="29%" />

超重 excess excessive

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_504_684_691_754.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A47Z%2F-1%2F%2Ffab2c4ad98aa595db2742a8f99532d2a51655da28a588fbabd8465d88be732c4" alt="Image" width="24%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_504_684_691_754.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A47Z%2F-1%2F%2Ffab2c4ad98aa595db2742a8f99532d2a51655da28a588fbabd8465d88be732c4" alt="Image" width="24%" />

in excess of 意为 “超过”；in relation to 意为 “关于，就…而论”；in contrast to 意为 “和…形成对比”；in favor of 意为 “赞成，支持”。

##### exclude

[Ik'skluːd] vt. 把…排除在外；不包括

记词根记忆：ex(出)+clud(关闭)+e→关出去→把…排除在外

例 Young children are excluded from the game.

小孩子不能玩这种游戏。

派 exclusion(n. 排除在外)

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_547_834_685_966.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A47Z%2F-1%2F%2Fcaf1207237f7141a288f85c85165b1505130a995af4d341967a91916f90651c8" alt="Image" width="18%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_547_834_685_966.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A47Z%2F-1%2F%2Fcaf1207237f7141a288f85c85165b1505130a995af4d341967a91916f90651c8" alt="Image" width="18%" />

TICKER ADULTS ONLY
exclude

</div>


</div>


#### exploit

[ɪkˈsplɔɪt] vt. 剥削；利用；开拓 [ˈeksplɔɪt] n. 英勇的行为

记 词根记忆：ex+ploit( 利用 )→利用；开拓

派 exploitation( n. 剥削；利用；开采 )

fame [feɪm] n. 名声，名望

记 联想记忆：名字 (name) 变 n 为 f 就成了名声 (fame)

派 famous(adj. 著名的)

辨 fame, honour, reputation

fame 常指好名声；honour 着重指因高尚的行为或品德而获得的荣誉和名声；reputation 既指好名声，也指坏名声。

fatal ['fertl] adj. 致命的；命中注定的；重大的，决定性的

记 来自 fate(n. 命运)

派 fatality(n. 宿命；致命性)

faulty ['fɔːlti] adj. 有错误的；有缺点的；有故障的

记来自 fault(n. 过错)

We do not have enough money to repair the faulty equipment. 我们没有足够的钱来修理出故障的设备。

favo(u)r [ˈfeɪvə(r)] n. 好感；赞同；恩惠 vt. 赞同；喜爱，偏爱；有利于

记发音记忆：“飞吻”→姑娘对那个小伙子很有好感，于是给了他一个飞吻→好感

考 in favour of 支持，赞同 win one's favour 获得某人的好感 show favour towards sb. 偏袒某人

具 If city leaders were more accountable to their residents, they might favour projects designed to help them more. 如果市领导对居民更负责的话，他们可能会偏爱对居民有更多帮助的项目。

fierce [friəs] adj. 凶猛的；强烈的；狂热的

记 发音记忆：“飞蛾死”→飞蛾扑火源于对光明狂热的追求→狂热的

fleet [fliːt] n. 舰队，船队

记 联想记忆：舰队 (fleet) 遇突袭逃跑 (flee)

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_544_662_704_793.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fef53aba77f3f53f601445a5df7fb7861e04ff0619a035ec4ec96143c6cf81dac" alt="Image" width="20%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_2/imgs/img_in_image_box_544_662_704_793.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fef53aba77f3f53f601445a5df7fb7861e04ff0619a035ec4ec96143c6cf81dac" alt="Image" width="20%" />

飞虫就死
fierce

</div>


</div>


forecast ['fɔːkɑːst] n. 预测，预报 v. (做)预测，(进行)预报

记 组合词：fore(前面)+cast(抛)→预先扔出→预测

例 It's hard to forecast the weather. 天气很难预测。

format [ˈfɔːrmaet] n. 设计，总体安排；格式，样式，版式 vt. 使格式化

例 In order to attract more readers, they brought out the magazine in a new format. 为了吸引更多的读者，他们以全新的版式出版了这本杂志。

forth [fɔːθ] adv. 向前；向外，往外

考 and so forth/on 等等

fame fatal faulty favo(u)r fierce

fleet forecast format forth

I came to know him, including his habits, his values and so forth. 我逐渐开始了解他，包括他的习惯、价值观等。

framework ['freɪmwɜːk] n. 框架，结构；准则；体系

记 组合词：frame(结构)+work→结构

frog [frg] n. 蛙；青蛙

记联想记忆：我与青蛙(frog)王子的邂逅像雾(fog)像雨又像风

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_3/imgs/img_in_image_box_550_147_709_277.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fbb22b50e4808aa3c683fe69d90c57b0d10933a590c595cd877f61f97ed7d85ea" alt="Image" width="21%" />

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//d37c707c-1fed-4ff1-832b-265c6d77d3b6/markdown_3/imgs/img_in_image_box_550_147_709_277.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A14%3A48Z%2F-1%2F%2Fbb22b50e4808aa3c683fe69d90c57b0d10933a590c595cd877f61f97ed7d85ea" alt="Image" width="21%" />

Oh No.
What ageit...
When will you
遂行
Prince Frog

</div>


</div>


furthermore [ˌfɜːðəˈmɔː(r)] adv. 而且，此外

记 组合词：further(更远的)+more(更…)→此外

例 The house is too small, and furthermore, it's too far from the school.

这座房子太小，而且离学校也太远了。

 $ ^{*} $gadget [ˈɡædʒɪt] n. 小器具；小装置

记 联想记忆：gad(尖头棒)+get→尖头棒是小工具的一种→小器具

派 gadgetry(n. 小配件，小器具)

globe [glæub] n. 地球，世界；地球仪；球体

记发音记忆：“哥伦布”→哥伦布环游世界→地球，世界

grace [greɪs] n. 优美，优雅；风度，魅力；（付款等的）宽限，缓期 vt. 使优美；为…增色；使生辉

记发音记忆：“格雷丝”→美国著名的影星，最后成为摩纳哥王妃，她是美丽、优雅的代表→优雅

考 with good grace 欣然地

派 graceful(adj. 优美的；得体的)；gracious(adj. 慈祥的；有礼貌的)

greenhouse ['griːnhaʊs] n. 温室，暖房

记 组合词：green(绿色的)+house(房子)→温室

guidance ['gaɪdns] n. 引导，指导

记词根记忆：guid(看作 guide，指导)+ance(表动作)→引导，指导

This guidance eliminated the need for customers to circle the parking lot endlessly, and avoided confrontation between those eyeing the same parking space. 这样的引导使顾客无须在停车场内不停地徘徊，也避免了人们因争抢同一个停车位而引起冲突。

hardware ['ha:dweə(r)] n. 五金器具；硬件

记 组合词：hard(坚硬的)+ware(部件)→五金器具；硬件

[ha:∫] adj. 严厉的；残酷的；粗糙的

记联想记忆：har(看作 hard，坚硬的)+sh→态度强硬→严厉的

貞 This reminds me unpleasantly of Sunnyhill School in Streatham,

☐ framework ☐ frog ☐ furthermore ☐ gadget ☐ globe

☐ grace ☐ greenhouse ☐ guidance ☐ hardware ☐ harsh

with its harsh tarmac, where I used to hang about in corners fantasizing about wildlife. 这唤起了我在斯特里特姆的桑尼希尔学校就读时的不愉快回忆，那时我常常在粗糙的柏油操场的角落里晃荡，幻想着野生动植物。

##### heal

[hi:l] v.（使）愈合，治愈，（使）康复；调停（争吵等），消除（分歧等）

例 This medicine will help heal cuts and scratches. 这种药物能帮助治愈刀伤和擦伤。

####  $ ^{*}hijack $

['haɪdʒæk] vt. 劫持（尤指飞机）；操纵（会议等，以推销自己的意图）

例 The criminals planned to hijack a plane. 犯罪分子计划劫机。

##### idle

['aɪdl] adj. 空闲的；懒散的；无用的 v. 虚度（光阴），无所事事

记发音记忆：“爱斗”→无所事事的人才爱斗→空闲的

考 idle away 虚度（光阴）idle about 无所事事

例 I used to idle away the hours watching TV. 我过去经常把时间浪费在看电视上。

派 idly(adv. 无所事事地；毫无目的地)

饼 idle, free

idle 指不该闲着却闲着；free 指自由、无拘无束。

imaginary [ɪˈmædʒɪnəri] adj. 想象中的，假想的

真 Things haven't turned out exactly as I imagined, but I wouldn't change what I have now for that imaginary world. 事情并没有完全如我所想象的那样发展，但是我不会为了想象中的世界去改变现在所拥有的。

辨 imaginary, imaginable, imaginative

imaginary 指想象中的、虚幻的，可与 ideal 互换；imaginable 指可以想象的；imaginative 则表示富有想象力的。

#### *impulse

['ɪmpʌls] n. 冲动；一时的念头；推动，驱使；脉冲

记 词根记忆：im(向内)+puls(推，驱动)+e→内在的驱动→冲动

考 on impulse 一时冲动，一时心血来潮 have an impulse to do sth. 有做某事的冲动

派 impulsive(adj. 冲动的，草率的)

##### indifferent

[In'difrənt] adj. 冷漠的；不积极的；一般的，（表现）平平的

记 词根记忆：in(不)+different(不同的)→并非与众不同的→一般的

考 表态度的词：indifferent 冷漠的；positive 肯定的，积极的；negative 否定的，消极的；cautious 谨慎的；critical 批评的；prejudiced 怀有偏见的；pessimistic 悲观的；doubtful 疑心的；concerned 关心的

派 indifference(n. 冷淡，漠不关心)



<table border=1 style='margin: auto; word-wrap: break-word;'><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>inevitable</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ɪnˈevɪtəbl] adj. 不可避免的，必然的\n记 词根记忆：in(不)→evitable(可避免的)→不可避免的\n具 Neighbor problems may sometimes seem inevitable, but it&#x27;s important to resolve them fairly. 邻里问题有时似乎是不可避免的，但是公正地解决这些问题却很重要。\n派 inevitably(adv. 不可避免地，必然地)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>instruct</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ɪnˈstrʌkt] vt. 指示，命令；通知；教授；训练\n记 词根记忆：in+struct(建筑)→指示人如何建筑→指示\n考 instruct sb. in (doing) sth. 教某人(做)某事\n例 They instruct us on what is justice. 他们教导我们什么是正义。\n派 instructor(n. 教练；导师)；instructive(adj. 富有教益的)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>interrupt</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ˌɪntəˈrʌpt] v. 打断，打扰，中断\n记 词根记忆：inter(在…之间)+rupt(断)→打断，中断\n考 interrupt sb./sth. with sth. 用某事物来打断某人或某事\n真 It was frequently interrupted by commercials. 它总是被商业广告打断。\n派 interruption(n. 打扰)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>invade</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ɪnˈveɪd] vt. 入侵，侵略，侵袭\n记 词根记忆：in(进入)+vad(走)+e→未经允许就走进来→入侵，侵略\n例 There is no sign that troops ever invaded the place. 没有迹象表明军队曾入侵过这个地方。\n派 invasion(n. 入侵,侵略)；invader(n. 侵略者)；invasive(adj. 侵入的)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>journalist</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;dɜːnəlɪst] n. 新闻工作者，新闻记者\n记 词根记忆：journal(日报)+ist(表人)→新闻工作者</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>justify</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;dʒʌstrɪfaɪ] vt. 证明…是正当的\n记 词根记忆：just(正确)+ify(使…)→证明…是正当的\n例 To justify this claim, the arguer provides a lot of evidence. 为了证明这个要求是正当的，那个辩论者提供了许多证据。\n派 justification(n. 正当理由)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>librarian</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[laɪˈbreəriən] n. 图书馆管理员\n记 来自 library(n. 图书馆)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>lightning</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;laɪtnɪŋ] n. 闪电\n记 联想记忆：light(光)+ning→一道光闪现→闪电</td></tr></table>

logic ['lɒdʒɪk] n. 逻辑，推理；逻辑学

记词根记忆：log(说话) + ic(…学，…术) → 说话的学问 → 逻辑，推理

真 Statistics and logic are both challenging subjects. 统计学和逻辑学都是具有挑战性的学科。

派 logical(adj. 符合逻辑的；合乎常理的)

machinery [məˈʃiːnəri] n. 机器，机械记 来自 machine(n. 机器)

mainland ['meɪnlaend] n. 大陆

记 组合词：main(主要的)+land(陆地)→大陆

miserable ['mɪzrəbl] adj.痛苦的；悲惨的；令人难受（或痛苦）的记来自 misery(n. 痛苦)

真 I always feel down when I see others accomplishing things and I feel miserable about my own achievements. 当我看到别人取得成功时，我总是感到沮丧，对自己的成就感到痛苦。

<div style="text-align: center;"><img src="https://pplines-online.bj.bcebos.com/deploy/official/paddleocr/pp-ocr-vl-16-online//ad7cea42-3ef7-4361-a752-31460baa89ee/markdown_1/imgs/img_in_image_box_576_358_696_491.jpg?authorization=bce-auth-v1%2FALTAKDN8mY5KlNI7zaRpLmOqrw%2F2026-06-22T15%3A15%3A03Z%2F-1%2F%2Fe0d857f73e08041d63a5857a35274f47ff042f27429dc214e0988078fcbfea06" alt="Image" width="15%" />

*mortgage [mɔːɡɪdʒ] n.按揭贷款 vt.抵押

记 联想记忆：mort(死)+gage(抵押品)→用抵押品抵销死账→抵押

例 You can get a mortgage of 1,000,000 dollars. 你能得到100万美元的抵押贷款。

##### negotiate

[nr'gəuʃiert] v.洽谈，协商；顺利通过，成功越过（险要路段）；达成（协议）

真 He said the report was aimed at world leaders, who will meet in Copenhagen in December to negotiate a new international climate treaty. 他说，这份报告是针对世界各国领导人的，这些领导人将于12月在哥本哈根会晤，商讨新的国际气候条约。

在谈判过程中，人常常会很忙，negotiate源自拉丁文negotium，neg-作为词缀有否定的意思，otium=leisure，字面理解就是not at leisure(正忙着)。

派 negotiation(n. 谈判); negotiable(adj. 可协商的)

##### nonsense

['nɒnsns] n. 胡说，废话；冒失（或轻浮）的行动

记词根记忆：non(不)+sense(意义)→无意义的话→废话

例 It's absolute nonsense to say they don't care about the competition. 说他们不在乎比赛，这完全是胡说八道。

<table border=1 style='margin: auto; word-wrap: break-word;'><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>orbit</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;ɔːbrɪt] n. 轨道 vt. 环绕…的轨道运行\nThe first private mission outside of the Earth&#x27;s orbit is closer than many of us think. 首次民间探索地球外太空之旅比我们很多人想象得要近。\norbital(adj. 轨道的)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>overcome</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[ˌəʊvəˈkʌm] vt. (overcome, overcame, overcome) 战胜, 克服; (感情等) 压倒, 使受不了\n来自词组 come over(战胜, 支配) 跳 Focusing on effort is effective in helping children overcome frustration and achieve success. 专注于自身努力能有效地帮助孩子克服挫折并获得成功。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>painter</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;peɪntə(r)] n. (油) 漆工; 画家\n来自 paint(v. 刷油漆; 描绘)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>*paperback</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;perpəbæk] n. 平装本, 简装本\n组合词: paper(纸)+back(书脊)→用普通纸张包装书脊→平装本, 简装本\n150,000 copies of the author&#x27;s first book were sold in paperback. 这位作家的第一本书是平装书, 卖了15万册。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>petrol</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[&#x27;petrəl] n. 汽油\n发音记忆: “派车”→汽车有油才能被派出去→汽油</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>plug</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[plʌg] n. 插头, 插座; 塞子, 栓 vt. 把…塞住, 用…塞住\nplug in 给…接通电源, 连接 plug into sth. 把(一台电器)与另一电器连接起来, 接通\nThe device plugs into the ground and then into a mobile phone. 将该装置插入土壤中, 然后和手机相连接。</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>postpone</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>[pə&#x27;spəʊn] vt. 延迟, 延期\n词根记忆: post(在后面)+pone(放)→放到后面→延迟\nIf the meal must be postponed for more than an hour, a snack helps to avoid a hunger headache. 如果正餐必须推迟一个小时以上, 小吃可以帮助避免饥饿引起的头痛。\npostponement(n. 延期)</td></tr><tr><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>oblige</td><td style='text-align: center; word-wrap: break-word;'>□ orbit □ overcome □ painter □ paperback</td></tr></table>

☐ oblige ___ orbit ___ overcome ___ painter ___ paperback

☐ petrol ___ plug ___ postpone

break-word;'>[prɪ&#x27;veɪl] vi. 流行，盛行；战胜；压倒\n[ɪnˈveɪl] n. 主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；财主；</td></tr></table>

例 She was very pleased to hear her parents remark on her personal improvement. 听到父母对她进步的评价，她非常高兴。

派 remarkable(adj. 值得注意的；非凡的)

##### remedy

['remədi] n. 补救办法，纠正办法；药品；治疗法 vt. 补救，纠正；医治，治疗

记 词根记忆：re(表加强)+med(治疗)+y→医治，治疗

例 He wished to remedy his mistake and please you. 他希望能够弥补过失并取悦你。

派 remedial(adj. 补救的)

['seɪlzmən] n. 售货员；推销员

记 组合词：sales(销售)+man(表人)→售货员

##### salesman

remedy NO SMOKING!
cure
